/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,librobot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o librobot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/robot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/robot_interfaces/msg/robot_status__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/robot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/robot_interfaces/srv/torque_set__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/wyp/test/robot_learning/week2/robot_ws/build/robot_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: librobot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
